nasb.text: Therefore, laying aside falsehood, speak truth each one  of you  with his neighbor, for we are members of one another.

esv.text: Therefore, having put away falsehood, let each one of you speak the truth with his neighbor, for we are members one of another.

cnv.text: 所以，你們要除掉謊言，各人要與鄰舍說真話，因為我們彼此是肢體。

ccb.text: 所以不要再说谎，大家都要彼此说真话，因为我们都是一个身体的肢体。

csbs.text: 所以，你们既然脱去虚假，每个人就要与自己邻人说真话，因为我们都是身体的一部分，彼此相属。
